au.updateNote: Still current at:12 July 2026 Updated:29 May 2026 Latest update:We continue to advise exercise a high degree of caution in Kenya due to the threat of terrorism and violent crime. Higher levels apply in some areas. Protests across Kenya, including in Nairobi may block roads and can turn violent. Security forces have used tear gas to disperse crowds (see 'Safety').
